name: ai-native-founder-playbook
description: Bilingual Agent Skill for AI-native startup idea validation, MVP scope, PMF diagnostics, launch operations, and scale-stage moat workflows.

interface.longDescription: A bilingual Codex plugin that packages the AI-Native Founder Playbook as an Agent Skill for startup idea validation, customer discovery, problem-solution fit, MVP scope, architecture context, PMF diagnostics, launch operations, GTM workflows, founder bottlenecks, enterprise readiness, data flywheel design, workflow lock-in, and scale-stage moat strategy.
defaultPrompt: Create an MVP scope and PMF plan.
